title: Kryeit Aeronautics
description: Kryeit - But with Aeronautics. This modpack adds Create, Aeronautics and many more Create-focused mods. It is made to be compatible with the Kryeit survival server, so that fellow Kryeitors can test and build airships for the coming Kryeit-Aero update.
body:
# Kryeit - But with Aeronautics

Kryeit Aeronautics is a modpack centered around Create and Aeronautics, it's a light modpack aiming to stay close to vanillas aesthetics.

It features Create Aeronautics, Create: Connected, Big Cannons, Design & Decor, and all main [Kryeit](https://modrinth.com/modpack/kryeit) mods.

Kryeit Aeronautics expands Kryeit's existing modpack to feature the Aeronautics mod and a bunch of extra QoL mods for Kryeitors to experience and test the new mod, in a Kryeit compatible environment, as Kryeit will update to include Aeronautics in the future.

Kryeit is a PvE survival server that's focused around the Create mod, bringing automation to Minecraft in an open, player engaging setting.

Create itself is a Minecraft mod focused on mechanical engineering and automation using gears, belts, processing blocks and moving contraptions. It lets players build complex factories, trains, farms, and transport systems with visually animated machinery, making automation feel creative and realistic.

Create Aeronautics expands the Create mod by adding buildable airships and flying machines powered by Create's mechanical systems. It focuses on engineering, automation, and aerial transport.

Keybinds:
- G to toggle Fullbright
- V to open Voice Chat Menu
- M to mute microphone
- Hold C to Zoom
